Purpose of filing the form: Reserve Unique Name-LLP for new incorporation or changing the name of an existing LLP.
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Rule 18(5) of the LLP Rules

Purpose of filing the form: Form for Incorporation of Limited Liability Partnership.
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Section 11 of the LLP Act; Rules 8, 11, and 18 of the LLP Rules

Purpose of filing the form: Information with regard to Limited Liability Partnership Agreement and changes, if any, made therein.
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Section 23(2) of the LLP Act; Rule 21(1) of the LLP Rules
Due date: Within 30 days of incorporation or within 30 days of any change

Purpose of filing the form: Notice of appointment, cessation, change in name/address/designation of a designated partner/partner and consent to become a partner.
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Section 7(4) and 25(2) of the LLP Act; Rules 8, 10(3), 22(2), and 22(3) of the LLP Rules
Due date: Within 30 days of appointment or change

Purpose of filing the form: Notice for change of name.
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Section 19 of the LLP Act; Rule 20(2) of the LLP Rules
Due date: Within 30 days of complying with the requirement to change the name

Purpose of filing the form: Intimation of particulars of name or address of a partner, or change in such particulars by a Partner to the LLP.
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Section 25(1) of the LLP Act; Rule 22(1) of the LLP Rules

Purpose of filing the form: Application for obtaining Designated Partner Identification Number (DPIN).
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Rule 10(1) of the LLP Rules
Remarks: DPINs are now applied for directly via Form FiLLiP at the time of incorporation (you can now apply for up to 5 DPINs this way). If a DPIN is needed after incorporation, the individual must file Form DIR-3.

Purpose of filing the form: Statement of Account & Solvency and Charge filing (creation/modification/satisfaction of charges).
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Section 34(3) of the LLP Act; Rule 24 of the LLP Rules
Due date: Within a period of 30 days from the end of six months of the financial year

Purpose of filing the form: Consent to act as Designated Partner.
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Section 7(3) of the LLP Act; Rule 7 of the LLP Rules
Due date: Event based (prior to acting as a DP)

Purpose of filing the form: Intimation of changes in particulars by Designated Partners.
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Rule 10(9) of the LLP Rules
Remarks: Any changes to a Designated Partner’s personal particulars (address, phone, email) must now be filed using Form DIR-6, rather than Form 10.

Purpose of filing the form: Annual Return of Limited Liability Partnership.
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Section 35(1) of the LLP Act; Rule 25(1) of the LLP Rules
Due date: Within 60 days of closure of its financial year

Purpose of filing the form: Form for intimating other address (other than registered office) for service of documents.
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Section 13(2) of the LLP Act; Rule 16(3) of the LLP Rules

Purpose of filing the form: Specimen of notice of cessation by a ceasing partner to other Partners.
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Section 24(1) of the LLP Act
Due date: Not less than 30 days before the date the partner intends to resign

Purpose of filing the form: Intimating the Registrar of Firms/Companies of the conversion of a firm/company into an LLP.
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Section 58(1) proviso of the LLP Act; Rule 33 of the LLP Rules
Due date: Within 15 days of the date of registration of conversion

Purpose of filing the form: Notice for change of place of registered office.
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Section 13(3) of the LLP Act; Rule 17 of the LLP Rules

Purpose of filing the form: Certificate of Incorporation.
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Section 12(1)(b) of the LLP Act; Rule 11(3) of the LLP Rules

Purpose of filing the form: Application and statement for the conversion of a firm into Limited Liability Partnership.
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Second Schedule of the LLP Act; Rule 38(1) of the LLP Rules

Purpose of filing the form: Application and Statement for conversion of a private company/unlisted public company into LLP.
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Third and Fourth Schedules of the LLP Act; Rules 39(1) & 40(1)

Purpose of filing the form: Certificate of Registration on Conversion.
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Section 58(1) of the LLP Act; Rule 32(1) of the LLP Rules

Purpose of filing the form: Affidavit in support of Summons (Compromise, Arrangement, Reconstruction).
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Section 60(1) of the LLP Act; Rule 35(1) of the LLP Rules

Purpose of filing the form: Form of advertisement of petition (This is a physical document/newspaper publication, not an e-form, used during Compromise/Arrangement).
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Rule 35(6) of the LLP Rules
Due date: Event-based (Not less than 14 days before the hearing)

Purpose of filing the form: Notice of intimation of Order of Court/Tribunal/CLB/Central Government to the Registrar (including compounding of offences).
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Rules 35(11), 35(17) and 41(4) of the LLP Rules
Due date: Within 30 days of making the order, or within 7 days for compounding of an offence

Purpose of filing the form: Application for direction to Limited Liability Partnership to change its name.
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Rule 19(1) of the LLP Rules

Purpose of filing the form: Application to the Registrar for striking off name.
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Section 75 of the LLP Act; Rule 37(1)(b) of the LLP Rules

Purpose of filing the form: Application for reservation/ renewal of name by a Foreign LLP/Foreign Company.
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Rule 18(3) of the LLP Rules

Purpose of filing the form: Form of Proxy (for appointing a proxy to vote at meetings).
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Rule 35(4) of the LLP Rules
Due date: Filed not later than 48 hours before the meeting

Purpose of filing the form: Form for registration of particulars by Foreign Limited Liability Partnership (FLLP).
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Rule 34(1) of the LLP Rules
Due date: Within 30 days of establishing a place of business in India

Purpose of filing the form: Alteration in the incorporation document, registered/principal office, partners, certificate of registration, authorized representatives, or cessation/closure of FLLP (Replaces Form 29).
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Rules 34(3) and 34(8) of the LLP Rules
Due date: Within 60 days of the close of the financial year (for structural changes) or within 30 days (for closure/address changes)

Purpose of filing the form: Certificate for Establishment of Place of Business in India.
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Rule 34(10) of the LLP Rules

Purpose of filing the form: Application for compounding of an offence under the Act.
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Rule 41(1) of the LLP Rules

Purpose of filing the form: Form for filing addendum for rectification of defects or incompleteness.
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Rule 36(6) of the LLP Rules

Purpose of filing the form: Application for allotment of Director/Designated Partner Identification Number (DIN/DPIN) for new partners post-incorporation.
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Rule 9(1) of Companies (Appointment and Qualification of Directors) Rules & LLP Rules

Purpose of filing the form: Intimation of change in particulars of a Designated Partner (Replaces the practical use of LLP Form 10).
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Rule 12(1) of Companies (Appointment and Qualification of Directors) Rules & LLP Rules

Purpose of filing the form: Mandatory annual KYC verification for all Designated Partners holding a valid DIN/DPIN to keep their status ""Active"".
Relevant rule and section under LLP rule: Rule 12A of Companies (Appointment and Qualification of Directors) Rules
